markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review November performance and align on new messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** November traffic was flat vs. October, but engagement rose, with engaged sessions increasing from 4.7k to 5.2k. This signals higher content quality and better internal linking.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [**Messaging Shift:** Alex is repositioning from "AI recruiter" to "agentic recruit," a four-agent system (Interview, Verify, Connect, Discover). All new content will use this messaging, and high-traffic existing articles will be updated.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [**Growth Strategy:** To accelerate growth, Alex will test commercial keywords with paid ads to validate organic targets and use customer stories on landing pages to build trust.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Topics

### November Performance Review

  - [**Content Production:** 23 articles published in November; 16 more are in the production pipeline to build a buffer for the holiday season.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [**Traffic & Engagement:**](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
      - [**Sessions:** Flat month-over-month (Oct: 28.9k → Nov: 28.7k).](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [**Engaged Sessions:** Increased from 4.7k to 5.2k.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
      - [**Engagement Rate:** High at 60%, indicating users are exploring the site.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
      - [**Top-Performing Articles:** "How to detect cheating with ChatGPT" and "Illegal interview questions."](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
      - [**Insight:** Pain-point-related topics are outperforming broad "best tools" lists.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**Search Visibility (GSC):**](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [**Position 1 Keywords:** Increased from 32 to 51.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [**Top 10 Keywords:** Growing overall, capturing more search impressions.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [**Competitive Presence (Scrunch):**](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
      - [Alex's presence grew from 0% to \~4% in three months.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
      - [**Insight:** This steady growth validates the content strategy and suggests continued publishing will increase market share.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

### New Messaging: "Agentic Recruit"

  - [**Repositioning:** From "AI recruiter" to "agentic recruit."](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [**Four-Agent System:**](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
    1.  [**Alex Interview:** Conducts interviews.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
    2.  [**Alex Verify:** Detects candidate fraud (e.g., resume/LinkedIn mismatches, spoofed addresses).](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
    3.  [**Alex Connect:** Integrates with ATS (e.g., Bullhorn) to sync data and automate interview creation.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
    4.  [**Alex Discover:** Uses natural language to find candidates in the ATS.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)

### Accelerating Growth

  - [**Paid Ads for Keyword Testing:**](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Test commercial keywords with paid ads to validate their lead quality and acquisition cost.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This provides fast feedback to inform the organic content strategy, which has a longer lead time.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
  - [**Leverage Social Proof:**](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
      - [Use customer stories and case studies on landing pages to support product claims and build trust.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
  - [**Target Competitor Alternatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
      - [Create content and ads for "alternatives to \[competitor\]" searches to capture high-intent users actively seeking a new solution.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [**Webinars (Limited):**](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
      - [Webinars with ATS partners are now difficult, as many ATS companies are developing their own AI features.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
      - [Update content artifacts with the new "agentic recruit" messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
      - [Queue new product pages for on-page SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [Share Scrunch competitive analysis data with Donald.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [Consult Kyle (Director) for paid search keyword strategy advice.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [**GrowthX & Alex:**](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
      - [Publish all new content using the "agentic recruit" framework.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
      - [Prioritize updating high-traffic existing articles with the new messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/zFBPuXrT2rfPqgDJSfH9vAL3dPxjAp1C?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
